## Summary / 摘要

Describe the problem and the smallest coherent change that solves it.

请说明问题，以及解决该问题的最小连贯改动。

## Tests / 测试

List the exact commands run and their results. State architecture, signing, external-service, or platform checks that were not run.

请列出实际运行的完整命令与结果，并说明未运行的架构、签名、外部服务或平台检查。

- [ ] Focused regression test added or the reason it is unnecessary is documented. / 已添加聚焦回归测试，或已说明不需要的原因。
- [ ] Relevant Web, .NET, Rust, cloud, packaging, and repository checks were run. / 已运行相关 Web、.NET、Rust、云端、打包和仓库检查。

## Security and privacy / 安全与隐私

- [ ] Permission, credential, execution, WebView2, plugin, cloud, and update trust boundaries are unchanged or documented. / 权限、凭据、执行、WebView2、插件、云端和更新信任边界未改变，或已记录变化。
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, fixtures, and commits contain no keys, tokens, prompts, private source, usernames, or local paths. / 日志、截图、夹具和提交中不含密钥、Token、提示词、私有源码、用户名或本地路径。
- [ ] Native execution is not described as sandboxed, and strict profiles still fail closed. / 未将本机执行描述为沙箱，严格配置仍保持 fail-closed。

## Documentation / 文档

- [ ] User-visible behavior, commands, protocols, safety limits, and migration steps are documented in English and Simplified Chinese. / 面向用户的行为、命令、协议、安全限制和迁移步骤已同步更新英文与简体中文文档。
- [ ] Dependency, generated, binary, license, or upstream-source changes are identified. / 已标明依赖、生成文件、二进制、许可证或上游源码变化。

## Screenshots / 截图

Include sanitized screenshots only for visible UI changes.

仅在可见界面变化时提供已脱敏截图。
